message:
refactor(fcp-testkit): const fn constructors, borrow parameters, and inline format args

Make new() constructors const fn on BridgeConnectionTracker,
QueryResultBuilder, QueryTracker, and LifecycleTracker. Make
rows_affected() and mutation() builders const fn on QueryResultBuilder.

Change mock_bridge_command_response, mock_bridge_event, and
with_json_body to take &Value instead of Value, avoiding unnecessary
clones at call sites. Inline format args in assert messages and
format!() calls per clippy recommendations. Fix doc comment formatting
for assert_rows_affected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
